rationale: Plan adds a self-contained UI module (src/ui/infoOverlay.ts) that aligns with the recommended module split in CLAUDE.md. It touches only two existing files (src/main.ts — 9 lines, src/style.css — 21 lines) with additive-only changes. No existing logic is modified or refactored. The overlay is pure DOM manipulation with no framework dependencies, no storage APIs, and no network calls — consistent with the project's privacy-conscious, no-persistence constraints.

alignment.module_split: Matches CLAUDE.md recommended path src/ui/infoOverlay.ts exactly
alignment.privacy: No storage, no analytics, no external requests — compliant
alignment.product_shape: Minimal UI (info button) as specified in Product Shape section
alignment.performance: Lightweight DOM elements, no render-loop cost
alignment.definition_of_done: Plan step 5 explicitly covers build, console errors, storage audit, and autoplay-context check

concerns.detail: Plan correctly identifies that overlay clicks must not leak into pointer entropy capture. stopPropagation on overlay is the right approach.
concerns.mitigation: Already addressed in plan risks section

concerns.detail: No z-index convention exists yet. This is the first layered UI element. A future audio toggle (US-011 sibling) will need compatible layering.
concerns.mitigation: Acceptable to establish convention here; document chosen z-index range in styles

suggestions: Consider exporting a single mountInfoUI(container) function rather than two separate create functions, to keep main.ts integration minimal and encapsulate wiring
Use CSS classes for show/hide toggling (e.g., .eavi-info-overlay--visible) rather than style.display, for better testability and transition support

files_impact_summary.src/ui/infoOverlay.ts: new — self-contained, no coupling to visual or audio modules
files_impact_summary.tests/ui/infoOverlay.test.ts: new — isolated unit tests, no integration surface
files_impact_summary.src/style.css: additive — new class rules only, no changes to existing selectors
files_impact_summary.src/main.ts: additive — 2-3 new lines (import + mount), no changes to existing init flow
